name: Configure Mail DNS
description: Create MX and SPF TXT records in Cloudflare for the mail domain. Runs only when 'smtp_own_domain' is true. Idempotent — checks existing records before creating. Requires CF_TOKEN from a cloudflare stack.

parameters.name: SMTP Host
parameters.description: SMTP server hostname (e.g. smtp.mailbox.org). Leave empty to skip SMTP setup.

parameters.name: SMTP Port
parameters.description: SMTP server port (587 for STARTTLS, 465 for implicit TLS).

parameters.name: SMTP Sender
parameters.description: From address on outgoing mail (e.g. admin@example.com). Must be authorized at the provider.

parameters.name: Own mail domain
parameters.description: When true, create MX and SPF DNS records in Cloudflare for the mail domain

parameters.name: Mail domain
parameters.description: Apex domain for mail (e.g. example.com), looked up in Cloudflare

parameters.name: MX target
parameters.description: Hostname the MX record points at (e.g. mxext1.mailbox.org)

parameters.name: SPF value
parameters.description: Full SPF TXT record value (e.g. v=spf1 include:mailbox.org ~all)

parameters.name: Cloudflare API Token
parameters.description: Cloudflare API token with Zone:DNS:Edit permission on the mail domain zone. Provided via the cloudflare stack. Required when smtp_own_domain is true.
